executionModelDetail: Direct in-session CI-pipeline change, parent-expanded by bubbles.workflow because the active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool (the established pattern for specs 085/089/097 in this repo). All phases were authored/executed directly with real evidence recorded in report.md.
inProgressReason: SCOPE-01 (release-gate build-clients + skip-tolerant publish-build-manifest + success-gated clients block in .github/workflows/build.yml, plus the lockstep drift-detector contract test) and SCOPE-02 (docs/Deployment.md server-only manifest + knb-gate contract) are both complete and proven in-repo: 12/12 internal/deploy contract tests GREEN (SCOPED_UNIT_EXIT=0) incl. 6 new spec-098 tests with adversarial coverage, CHECK_EXIT=0, LINT_EXIT=0. A done promotion is blocked by state-transition-guard Check 17, which requires a structured spec(098) commit touching the spec dir; this validation run is constrained to no-commit / no-push (pushing would trigger the very CI client build this spec gates). Landed validated-in-repo at the honest status the guard allows. No fabrication of done.

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the planning phases and authored the artifacts directly.
executionHistory.note: Verified the coupling solution-blind (build.yml publish-build-manifest needs build-clients with no guard; build-clients fail-fasts on ANDROID_KEYSTORE_BASE64; specs 087/088/089 confirm SKIPPED manifest), and the clients-absent precedent (build-home-lab.sh local-build-manifest + dual-shape promote_manifest_parse.sh). Authored spec.md (FR-098-01..07, SCN-098-A01..A04), design.md (Current-Truth map + 3-way design fork resolved to release-gating + skip-tolerance + success-gate, GitHub Actions needs/skip semantics, contract-test design, knb-side contract), and scopes.md (SCOPE-01 workflow+test, SCOPE-02 docs).

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the implement phase and wrote the changes directly.
executionHistory.note: build.yml: +workflow_dispatch input build_clients (default false); +build-clients.if release gate (startsWith refs/tags || build_clients=='true'); +publish-build-manifest.if skip-tolerant guard (server-side success + build-clients success|skipped); +3 step-level if needs.build-clients.result=='success' on the client-digest steps. Contract test build_workflow_clients_contract_test.go updated in lockstep: corrected the build-clients ] marker message, added assertConditionalClientsDecoupling + assertManifestClientsPolicy + 6 spec-098 tests (1 live, 2 policy, 3 adversarial). docs/Deployment.md: +server-only manifest subsection incl. knb E025-CLIENT-MANIFEST-NO-DIGEST expectation.

executionHistory.expansionReason: The active workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool, so bubbles.workflow parent-expanded the test/validate phases and ran the suites + guards directly.
executionHistory.note: Ran the contract tests via ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run. First run surfaced one over-strict TEST message assertion (TestClientsDecoupling_AdversarialUngatedClientBuild expected 'release intent' but the contract correctly rejected via the unique github.event.inputs.build_clients marker because a pre-existing tag-gated step also matches startsWith refs/tags) — fixed the assertion to match the 'release' token; the contract function itself was already correct. Re-run GREEN: internal/deploy ok, 12/12 tests pass, SCOPED_UNIT_EXIT=0. CHECK_EXIT=0, LINT_EXIT=0.

scopeProgress.name: Gate the client build on release intent + publish a server-only manifest
Document the server-only manifest contract + knb-gate expectation
